violations.text: Allergen statement is lacking on menu. Establishment is to add allergen statement to menu. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishments RICFSM has expired. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Molluscan Shellfish clams located in prep unit did not have the proper identification tags. Molluscan Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the Molluscan Shellstock are received until the container is empty. Tag was placed with product at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine and slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and put out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine or slicer until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils were re-located at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

Prep unit gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The left basin of the 3-bay sink was observed with a leak and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The outside dumpster area was observed with an accumulation of debris. Outside refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The floor in the back storage building has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage building. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The following door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. 1. Refrigerator 2. Bar cooler 3. Prep unit Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2024
The following door gaskets were observed in poor repair. 1. Prep unit 2. Bar cooler 3. Refrigerator (outside storage) New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024
At time of inspection, ambient of bar cooler was 48 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC to not store TCS foods in unit until it reaches 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
Strainer was observed in the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with black and brown biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (dry ingredient bins, spices, prep unit shelving) were observed with an accumulation of rodent droppings. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

Beef was observed held on top of prep unit at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Per interview with cook, beef was put out less than one hour prior. Informed PIC on proper cold hold storage, food was placed inside unit at time of inspection. Whipped cream was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Per interview with PIC, whipped cream was put in unit less than 2 hours prior. PIC moved to another unit at time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

Calamari was observed thawing in prep sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by high rodent activity. Inspector observed droppings in main kitchen and basement, nesting materials in basement and burrows outside (alongside building and dumpster area). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

At time of inspection, ambient of bar cooler was 48 degrees Fahrenheit. TCS foods moved. PIC to not store TCS foods in unit until it reaches 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
The following door gaskets were observed in poor repair. 1. Prep unit 2. Bar cooler 3. Refrigerator (outside storage) New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of rodent droppings: 1. Microwave shelving 2. Oven shelving 3. Rags (basement) 4. Dry ingredient shelving (basement & kitchen) 5. Boiler 6. Ledges (basement) New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024

The floors in the kitchen and basement have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
Observed missing hood panel. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
